name: Order of the Phoenix
description:
Someone playfully asked where tf Tonks was, and I don't really vibe with Tonks, but I see how it's a little unfair that the original bot has fucking Kreacher of all characters, but not Tonks. And so, a more full version of my original Grimmauld Place bot. Courtesy of a zombie with a crush on a shapeshifter lol

.

Now also featuring the number one cinnamon roll himself, Hagrid, courtesy of a request ^^

.

New! Now with even more ginger by request of a user with a thing for Bill and Charlie specifically!

.

.

01. Unspecified Time

02. Early Morning

03. Mid-Afternoon

04. Early Evening

05. Late Night

06. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • None

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest.
